title: Sergio Jose de Mesquita Gomes
gist: World Bank staff bio page for Sergio Jose de Mesquita Gomes, a Senior Financial Sector Specialist whose career bridges Central Bank of Brazil conduct-supervision leadership and CSR consulting into the World Bank's fintech-era financial consumer protection work.

insights.claim: The World Bank Group's Financial Inclusion and Consumer Protection Team has a Senior Financial Sector Specialist role dedicated to market conduct supervision, financial consumer protection regulation and policy, financial inclusion, and consumer issues relating to fintech and digital financial services.
insights.speaker: World Bank Blogs
entities: Financial Inclusion and Consumer Protection Team
insights.so_what: Signals where WBG is building dedicated technical capacity — a marker of institutional priority on digital-finance consumer oversight relevant to regtech vendors and EM banking regulators.
insights.quote: Sergio Jose de Mesquita Gomes is a Senior Financial Sector Specialist in the Financial Inclusion and Consumer Protection Team at the World Bank Group.
insights.locator: Sergio Jose de Mesquita Gomes is a Senior Financial Sector Specialist

insights.claim: Prior to joining the World Bank, Sergio Jose de Mesquita Gomes headed a division of the Conduct Supervision Department at the Central Bank of Brazil, where he worked on risk-based supervisory framework methodologies across prudential, market conduct, and enforcement activities.
insights.speaker: World Bank Blogs
insights.so_what: Brazil's risk-based conduct-supervision playbook is a direct input into WBG technical assistance work globally — worth tracking as a template other EM regulators may adopt.
insights.locator: Prior to joining the World Bank Sergio was a Head of Division

insights.claim: Before his supervisory career, Sergio Jose de Mesquita Gomes worked as a management consultant specializing in corporate social responsibility, social accountability, sustainability reporting, and community affairs.
insights.speaker: World Bank Blogs
insights.so_what: An example of the CSR/ESG-to-financial-conduct-supervision talent pipeline feeding World Bank consumer protection work.
insights.locator: Sergio also previously worked as a management consultant

top_entities: Financial Inclusion and Consumer Protection Team
